name: price-tracker-ai-mcp
description: > **By [MEOK AI Labs](https://meok.ai)** — Track product prices over time, set price drop alerts, and compare across retailers. By MEOK AI Labs

tools.name: track_price
tools.description: Record a price observation for a product. Tracks history and detects drops automatically.

tools.name: get_price_history
tools.description: Get the price history for a tracked product. Returns most recent entries up to limit.

tools.name: set_alert
tools.description: Set a price alert. Get notified when a product drops to or below the target price.

tools.name: compare_prices
tools.description: Compare current prices across multiple tracked products. Provide comma-separated product names.
